site.title: YOUR NAME — RPG-Themed Developer Portfolio
site.description: A pixel/RPG-themed portfolio template. Edit src/data/content.json to make it yours.

contact.resumeMessage: Hi, could I get a copy of your resume?

hero.name: YOUR NAME
hero.subtitle: Your Role · One-line pitch about what you do
hero.description: A couple of sentences summarizing your experience and what kind of work you're looking for.

about.title: A short, punchy line about your career so far.

story.heading: My Story
paragraphs: A paragraph about your background, the kind of systems/products you build, and the technologies you specialize in.
A second paragraph highlighting notable experience — industries you've worked in, standout projects, or a career narrative.

care.heading: What I Care About
paragraphs: A paragraph about your engineering values — code quality, architecture, collaboration, whatever matters to you.
A second paragraph about how you like to work or what kind of teams/projects you thrive in.

quests.title: Your Current Role
objectives: A bullet point describing a key responsibility or achievement.
Another bullet point about impact or ownership.
A third bullet point, e.g. tools/process you introduced.

quests.title: Previous Role
objectives: A bullet point describing a key responsibility or achievement.
Another bullet point about impact or ownership.
A third bullet point, e.g. a system you built or improved.

quests.title: Earlier Role
objectives: A bullet point describing a key responsibility or achievement.
Another bullet point about impact or ownership.

missions.title: Projects shipped, by company.
missions.disclaimer: Optional note about how these projects were delivered (e.g. as an employee/contractor, as part of a team) and any confidentiality caveats.

skills.title: The loadout, current as of today.

contactSection.title: Got a role that needs a steady hand?
contactSection.description: A sentence about what kind of roles/engagements you're open to.
contactSection.footerNote: Want a copy of my resume? Message me on WhatsApp or email.
